statistics_policy.reliability_rule: actual >= expected when metric ends with _min, actual <= expected when metric ends with _max

truth_source_refs: independent orbit such as GRACE-FO pso_*

recalibration_policy.trigger: first mission calibration run or truth-source / protocol change

orbit_rtn_rms_m.notes: Set after first approved calibration run.

arsig_fix_rate_min.notes: Define after log parser and first approved calibration run.
